problem_statement: Small clinics lose follow-up context when personal intake data and notes sit across several tools.
target_market: Clinic operations teams coordinating personal intake follow-up.
offered_solution: An AI assistant that organizes personal intake data and follow-up notes into a reviewable workflow.
validation_goal: Test whether a privacy-sensitive operations team would trust an automated follow-up workflow.
landing_page_text: Reduce manual intake follow-up while keeping data handling visible and controlled.
mvp_scope: Upload intake notes, extract tasks, and review the follow-up queue.
concierge_mvp_idea: Founder manually reviews intake notes and returns a follow-up list.
assumptions: Teams want less manual coordination work.
Users will trade some automation for clear data boundaries.
constraints: Need to minimize sensitive data exposure.
known_risks: Trust may fall if the workflow sounds too intrusive.
